series_metadata.series_description: Test results for applicants that attempt the entry level respiratory care examination for Ohio licensure. Candidates have no limits regarding the number of times exam is taken.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 60 years or until notification of death, then destroy, unless scanned to machine readable format, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 60 years or until notification of death, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
